productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Impel Leather Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteSleek and yet aggressively designed, the nike Air Impel Leather shoe for men comes with an Air unite technology. Nike Air units work by trapping air molecules inside a durable urethane shell. With each footstrike, the air unit compresses to reduce the force of impact, then immediately recovers its shape to be ready for the next landing. Nike Air units are built to last, so the cushioning properties hold steady for the life of the shoe. Ergonomically designed and well cushioned, it's a great shoe for runs and casual occasions.Product DetailsWhite shoe with synthetic upper, central lace-ups, overlays, perforations on the toe region, Nike swoosh on the medial part of the shoe, reinforced overlay at the heel counter with perforationsBranding on the tongue and on the heel collarSoft footbed with meshed and padded tongue and innerNike Rolling Rail makes for a stable ride through the heel-to-toe transitionFull-length Phylon midsole combined with an encapsulated Air Sole unit in heel provide cushioning and supportRubber forefoot outsole provides traction and exposed Phylon flex grooves lend flexibilityMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
